suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the structured handoff protocol introduced by prompts-structured-handoffs feature. The protocol includes: AgentHandoff struct with fields (what_was_done, artifacts, verification, known_issues, whats_next) and AgentComment types (Start, Blocker, Handoff, Completion). Currently AGENTS.md defines agent types but not the handoff format.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: prompts-structured-handoffs review flagged that AGENTS.md doesn't document the handoff protocol introduced by this feature.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the audit log file naming convention. The agent-audit-trail skill specifies 'audit/atlas-actions.ndjson' but SWELL uses 'audit/swell-actions.ndjson'. Neither AGENTS.md nor .factory/library/ specify the expected audit log path convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: audit-hash-chained-log review flagged that audit log file path naming convention is not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the skill selection process when feature descriptions reference multiple skills. Several features (prompts-quality-improvement, prompts-multi-run-validation) reference skills in their description (prompt-engineering-expert, agent-evaluation) but have skillName: 'Rust' in features.json, causing potential confusion about which skill actually applies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: prompts-quality-improvement and prompts-multi-run-validation both have skill description mismatch between feature description mentioning specific skills and skillName field being 'Rust'.

rejectedObservations.observation: prompt-engineering-expert skill principles not followed due to skillName being Rust
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous - the implementation actually did follow prompt-engineering-expert principles despite skillName mismatch, so this observation is contradicted by the evidence

rejectedObservations.observation: agent-audit-trail skill defines 4 additional event kinds (credential-access, install-extend, payment, ingress) not implemented
rejectedObservations.reason: AGIRAILS-platform-specific - these appear to be for a payment platform context not applicable to SWELL MVP
